scripts.build: node scripts/write-imported-article-body-files.mjs && tsc -b && vite build && node scripts/prerender.mjs
scripts.verify:live: VERIFY_BASE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com VERIFY_REQUIRE_STRICT_404=1 VERIFY_REQUIRE_ORIGIN_HEADERS=1 npm run verify:migration
scripts.verify:live:edge: VERIFY_BASE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com VERIFY_REQUIRE_STRICT_404=1 VERIFY_REQUIRE_EDGE_REDIRECTS=1 VERIFY_REQUIRE_ORIGIN_HEADERS=1 npm run verify:migration
scripts.cutover:live: npm run verify:live && SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com npm run smoke:browser
scripts.preflight:okhlopkov: npm run verify:seo-clusters && npm run build:okhlopkov && SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com npm run verify:image-seo && npm run migration:map && npm run check:public-safety && SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com npm run verify:hreflang && SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com npm run verify:dist && SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com npm run smoke:dist
scripts.preflight:pages: npm run verify:seo-clusters && npm run build:pages && SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com npm run verify:image-seo && npm run migration:map && npm run check:public-safety && SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com npm run verify:hreflang && SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com npm run verify:dist && SITE_URL=https://okhlopkov.com npm run smoke:dist
